ddls:
CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation */,
  "anov_issue_date" TEXT /* Date the ANOV (Administrative Notice of Violation) was issued */,
  "street_no" TEXT /* Street number where the violation occurred */,
  "street_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the street (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  "street_name" TEXT /* Name of the street where the violation occurred */,
  "anov_number" TEXT /* ANOV number assigned to the violation */,
  "violation_description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the violator */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who issued the ANOV */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the violation occurred */,
  "violation_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status of the violation (e.g., pending, addressed) */,
  "violation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of violation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic camera that captured the violation */,
  "citizen_report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the citizen report that led to the violation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_violation_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_status_id") REFERENCES violation_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_violation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_type_id") REFERENCES violation_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the officer belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the officer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the officer */,
  "patrol_area" TEXT /* Area assigned to the officer for patrol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Complete address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area where the location falls (e.g., downtown, uptown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violation_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the violation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the violation type */,
  "penalty_amount" REAL /* Default penalty amount for the violation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the violation status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the violation status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the violation record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the violation record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the violation record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violation_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the violation the action is related to */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., warning, fine) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who took the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violation_actions_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violation_actions_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the violation record being tracked */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violation_history_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violation_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, monthly, custom) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_cameras" (
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera */,
  "camera_name" TEXT /* Name of the camera */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the camera was installed */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the camera is installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_cameras_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citizen_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citizen report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was submitted */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "reporter_name" TEXT /* Name of the citizen who submitted the report */,
  "reporter_email" TEXT /* Email address of the citizen who submitted the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, bicycle) */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violation_vehicle" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the violation */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle involved in the violation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id", "vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_history" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the violation for which the payment was made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appeals" (
  "appeal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appeal */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the violation for which the appeal was filed */,
  "appeal_date" TEXT /* Date when the appeal was filed */,
  "appeal_status" TEXT /* Status of the appeal (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appeal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appeals_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id")
)
